Environment Of Tier-69 College is Hell.

Writing .....

June 07, 2026

Hi Everyone, I’m Rohit and I have passed btech recently.

And I’m going to share how i spend my 4 year in college and how the environment of my tier-69 college is hell.

So after getting a very good rank in my JEE exam it was something like 36514369696969… i had a good oppurtunity to get admission in a tier-3 college of lucknow.

It’s August 2022 and
